textByHash.7c00eedc734813c773102fe745772b6cd59ecae7: Do you mind? You're in my home.
textByHash.4b0cbe41f9dbfc18718c7c1ec3b1edb02f6525c8: We can't all live in plush houses, you know. But that doesn't mean us mining dwarves don't work hard.
textByHash.2fcdd1fcfa1da0bdeedd48a4f2da7438e046e1bf: Normally the coal mine to the north. We need a lot of coal to keep our steam engines going, you know.
textByHash.1347f81b4cdbf25972d7d98adb90f2037e4d531e: I'm not sure, but as long as no one notices I don't think anyone is going to care.
